overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from God of War Ragnarök showing Kratos walking through a snowy Norse landscape with ancient stone ruins during a persistent lightning storm, accompanied by Atreus, approaching a dark cave entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy tundra with distant Norse ruins

agents.ego_description: Kratos walking steadily through deep snow toward ancient ruins, Leviathan Axe strapped to back

notable_agents.action: Atreus following closely behind on the left side

entered.detail: Persistent lightning strike visible in the cloudy sky above the mountains
Distant mountain peaks blanketed in snow forming the horizon
Norse stone structures and walls partially buried in snow
Massive curved wooden beam structure forming an entrance gateway
Collapsed wooden pillars and beams covered in snow

segments.scene_description: Kratos walks through an expansive snowy landscape under a stormy sky with a persistent lightning bolt visible. Ancient stone ruins and a large wooden archway stand ahead in the distance, while Atreus follows behind. The terrain is open tundra with snow-covered mountains on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient ruin passage with wooden archway

events.description: passes under the large wooden archway into the ruin complex
dark cave entrance becomes visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Kratos continuing forward through the ruins, passing under the archway

entered.detail: Tall carved stone column wrapped with rope bindings
Dark opening in the stone wall leading into the mountain

segments.scene_description: Kratos passes under the massive wooden archway into a more confined ruin area. The stone ruins shift to the left as the path opens toward a cave entrance visible on the right. The lightning bolt remains visible in the sky to the left as the character moves through the ancient structures.

events.description: approaching the dark cave entrance in the stone wall

agents.ego_description: Kratos walking toward the cave entrance, preparing to enter the dark tunnel

notable_agents.action: Atreus following as they approach the cave

entered.detail: Shadowy interior of the cave becoming visible as the entrance nears
Jagged snow-covered rocks flanking the cave entrance

segments.scene_description: Kratos approaches the dark cave entrance on the right side of the snowy path. The wooden arch and stone pillars are now behind, replaced by rocky outcrops surrounding the tunnel mouth. The lightning storm continues overhead as the character nears the transition from the open snow field into the dark cave interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an expansive, storm-lashed tundra that gradually narrows into the mouth of a dark cave. It begins with Kratos and Atreus traversing an open snowy landscape under a stormy sky where a persistent lightning bolt strikes against a backdrop of distant mountains. As the camera moves forward, the terrain shifts from open tundra to a more confined area as Kratos passes beneath a massive wooden archway and moves past ancient stone ruins. The scene then opens toward the right, leaving the pillars behind as the path is increasingly flanked by jagged rocky outcrops. Finally, the camera follows the characters as they leave the snow-covered field and approach the dark entrance of the cave while the lightning storm continues to rage overhead.
